title: Warborn: 100 Days
description: A modpack used by 100 players in a civ war event!
body:
## ⚔️ **Warborn: 100 Days**

### Welcome to the 100-Day War.
An abandoned world swallowed by ruins and silence — now torn apart once more by war.
This modpack powers a large-scale PvP survival event built around Superb Warfare, The Lost Cities, and a full-blown tactical sandbox.

Battle across decaying cities, control choke points, and survive through 100 in-game days of escalating chaos.
Every decision matters — supplies are scarce, and one mistake can cost your life.
